Question? Give us feedback Edit this page 
Effects

Effects

Every timeline entry is one effect, discriminated by action. They fall into five lanes: camera, navigation, cursor, interaction and timing.

zoom-in / out
highlight
cursor-move

Interactions actually touch the app. type-down writes into a real field:

Reference

Shared optional fields on every effect: frameId, delayBefore, delayAfter, note. easing is one of linear · ease-in · ease-out · ease-in-out · spring.

ActionKey fieldsDefault duration
clickframeId, showRipple, soundProfile~500ms
type-downframeId, text, typingSpeed, mistakestext.length × speed
drag-and-dropframeId, destFrameId/destX,destY800ms
shakeframeId, intensity500ms
zoom-inframeId?, scale, transformOrigin1200ms
zoom-out—900ms
scroll-up / scroll-downdistance700ms
cursor-movedestFrameId/destX,destY, curve700ms
highlightframeId, dimOpacity, padding1500ms
waitduration1000ms

All are strongly typed with Zod; the timesheet schema rejects an unplayable sheet before a single frame is recorded.

ConceptsTimesheet
